summary: Tested rebrand (saFeConnect) + cold-start backend + frontend rebrand. Fixed CRITICAL backend startup crash (NameError on SAMPLE_GUIDES) by rewriting seed_data() to only purge legacy @safeconnect.demo data (per PRD). After fix: 14/14 backend pytest cases pass including cold-start emptiness, demo login rejection, guide register + idempotent update + city/country filtering + /locations endpoint, trips CRUD, matches, chat, posts, emergency/SOS, and AI GPT-4o reply. Frontend rebrand verified on splash/onboarding, login, signup: 'saFeConnect' brand with 'Fe' in distinct pink, light cream-blush gradient (no deep purple), NO demo credentials box, NO seeded users/posts leaking through.

critical.issue: CRITICAL BUG FIXED BY TESTER: server.py line 940 referenced undefined SAMPLE_GUIDES/SAMPLE_USERS/SAMPLE_POSTS (the constants were renamed to _SAMPLE_*_DISABLED). Caused NameError at app startup → backend would not start. Rewrote seed_data() to purge legacy @safeconnect.demo users (+ their posts/trips/matches) and orphan seeded guides (no user_id), and to NOT insert any seed data, matching the PRD ('seed function now only purges legacy demo data — it inserts nothing').

minor.issue: public_user() omits is_guide / guide_id, so /auth/me cannot be used by the frontend to detect guide state. PRD says 'GET /api/auth/me reflects is_guide=true'. Currently only /api/guides/mine reveals it. Consider adding is_guide to public_user output.
_SAMPLE_GUIDES_DISABLED, _SAMPLE_USERS_DISABLED, _SAMPLE_POSTS_DISABLED (~200 lines) are unused constants. Safe to delete in a future cleanup.

ui_bugs.issue: Right-arrow icon clipped by container edge at 390x844 viewport (mobile). Cosmetic, button still functional.

issues: Brand renders correctly as sa<Fe>Connect with 'Fe' in pink (rose/coral).
Background uses light cream → blush gradient. No deep purple anywhere — palette matches the new feminine theme.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: Consider adding is_guide / guide_id to public_user() so /api/auth/me reflects guide status (PRD requirement).
Delete dead _SAMPLE_*_DISABLED constants in server.py to reduce file size (~200 lines).
Fix onboarding Next-button arrow clipping at 390px width.
Migrate deprecated React Native style props (shadow*, props.pointerEvents).
Optional: add testID='splash-title' to splash screen — splash currently auto-transitions to onboarding quickly so the testID is not reachable in web preview tests.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1000 lines — past the 700-line guideline. Worth splitting into routers (auth, guides, trips, posts, chat, sos, ai).
All endpoints exclude Mongo _id correctly via projection.
JWT_SECRET / EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read from env via os.environ[...] (fail-fast) ✓
/api/guides is public (no auth) — intentional but worth confirming with product.
register_guide() correctly upserts by user_id (no duplicates on re-submit).
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (rewrote seed_data() to fix startup NameError and align with PRD: purge-only, no inserts)
/app/backend/tests/test_safeconnect.py (rewritten end-to-end for cold-start app — 14 tests covering rebrand requirements)

success_rate.frontend: Partial — verified splash/onboarding, login, signup-step1 rebrand & no-demo-data; did not complete signup wizard step 2 → home → discover/guides tab → /guide/register full flow due to multi-step form and token budget. Main agent should self-verify these visual flows.

seed_data_creation: None — app is cold-start by design. Every test creates fresh TEST_* accounts via /api/auth/signup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_safeconnect.py (pytest, 14 tests). Frontend testIDs discovered: login → login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, go-signup, toggle-password. Signup is 2-STEP wizard: step 1 uses signup-name/age/phone/email/password + signup-next; step 2 likely contains signup-submit (not yet explored). Onboarding has onboarding-screen / onboarding-skip / onboarding-next. Brand renders as sa<Fe in pink>Connect — Fe accent confirmed visually. Backend public URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (NOT EXPO_BACKEND_URL — the system prompt mentioned the wrong key; frontend/.env exposes EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL).
rca_of_issue: Root cause of the only backend bug: PR renamed the in-memory seed constants to _SAMPLE_*_DISABLED but left seed_data() still iterating SAMPLE_GUIDES/SAMPLE_USERS/SAMPLE_POSTS — undefined names → NameError at FastAPI startup → uvicorn exited. Reproduction: `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` and watch backend.err.log. Mitigation applied: rewrote seed_data() to only purge legacy @safeconnect.demo users (cascading delete of their posts/trips/matches) and orphan seeded guides (no user_id) — no inserts. Verified by clean startup log and 14/14 tests passing.
